changeSet.author: study-entry-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'test name' AND french = 'Murex Combinaison'

changeSet.comment: Seed localization rows for Murex Combinaison

changeSet.author: study-entry-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test t JOIN clinlims.localization l ON l.id = t.name_localization_id WHERE l.french = 'Murex Combinaison'

changeSet.comment: Seed test row for Murex Combinaison
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.test(id,description,is_active,is_reportable,lastupdated, name,orderable,guid,name_localization_id,reporting_name_localization_id,notify_results) VALUES (nextval('test_seq'),'Murex Combinaison','Y','N',now(), 'Murex Combinaison',true,gen_random_uuid()::text, (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description='test name' AND french='Murex Combinaison' LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description='test report name' AND french='Murex Combinaison' LIMIT 1), false);

changeSet.author: study-entry-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM clinlims.test t JOIN clinlims.localization l ON l.id = t.name_localization_id WHERE l.french = 'Murex Combinaison' AND (t.is_active != 'Y' OR t.orderable IS DISTINCT FROM true)

changeSet.comment: Patch Murex Combinaison – ensure active and orderable
changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.test SET is_active='Y', orderable=true, lastupdated=now() WHERE name_localization_id IN ( SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description='test name' AND french='Murex Combinaison');

changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.test SET is_active='Y', orderable=true, lastupdated=now() WHERE name_localization_id IN ( SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description='test name' AND french='Genscreen');
